attributes.description:
Controls the border radius for rounded corners of the button group component. This makes the button group appear with rounded corners instead of sharp edges.
CSS variable: --wm-button-group-radius

Controls the border radius for rounded corners of the horizontal button group layout. This makes the button group appear with rounded corners when arranged horizontally.
CSS variable: --wm-button-group-outlined-layout-horizontal-radius

Controls the border radius for rounded corners of the vertical button group layout. This makes the button group appear with rounded corners when arranged vertically.
CSS variable: --wm-button-group-outlined-layout-vertical-radius
